title: Select Game
menuMtpDesc:
Transfer mod files via USB connection
 - Faster transfer speed, but may fail when transferring folder-type mods with a large number of small files
 - For mods with many small files, it is recommended to pack them into a ZIP archive first, or use FTP for more stable transfers
menuFtpDesc:
Transfer mod files via Wi-Fi
 - Slower transfer speed; recommend using a third-party FTP client with 6 threads enabled for better efficiency
tidInvalid: Invalid game TID, please check and try again!
firstLaunchNoticeBody: Due to limitations of the Switch mod system, adding local mods is relatively complicated. This app has greatly simplified the process, but there is still a learning curve. First-time users should read the following information carefully.
firstLaunchMethodBody: First, use MTP or FTP from the  menu to transfer mod files to the transit area. Then select the corresponding game card and choose the mods from the transit area to assign them. Please refer to the menu descriptions for MTP and FTP precautions.
firstLaunchFormatBody:
- ZIP archive: Only ZIP format is currently supported. The archive name is used as the mod name.
- Folder: The top-level folder name is used as the mod name.
firstLaunchFilenameBody: All files and directories must use English-only names. Using non-English characters will cause the operation to fail and leave residual files.
